text:
Once upon a time in a lively little village called Oakridge lived a bright little girl named Polly.

Polly dreamed of exploring distant lands. She learned all about famous explorers. On weekends, she dressed like them, with hatboxes on her toes.

One sunny afternoon, Polly decided she wanted an exploratory excursion to the enchanted forest. She packed her hatbox with treasures and off she went!

Deep in the heart of the forest, Polly stumbled upon an old oak tree. She climbed up to take a picture.

Then she heard a giggle. Suddenly, tiny fairies glided all around her!

"Why hello!" one flew out.

"Polly!" another giggled.

"You must be very brave!" an owl said.

"Oh! You lovely things!" said Polly. She hung out with them for hours.

That night, her foxily owl friend brought her stars!

Back home, Polly slept under her hatbox.

Every night ever after!

That's just one of Polly's tales. She
